title: narcissus pseudonarcissus f. obvallaris
intro: Narcissus pseudonarcissus f. obvallaris is a variant of the wild daffodil, a perennial plant species characterized by its trumpet-shaped flowers and hollow leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Narcissus pseudonarcissus f. obvallaris include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve mood, and possess antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the bulbs of the plant are often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
